# MedOps HMS

> Generated by docmd

How to use MedOps HMS, the hospital management platform: feature guides and role-based usage help for administrators, doctors, nurses, front-desk staff, and pharmacy teams.

## Documentation Files

- [Admitted Patients (IPD)](https://the-medops.github.io/user-guide/features/admitted-patients/)
  Admit patients to beds in MedOps HMS, record ward rounds and vitals, add inpatient medications, transfer between beds, and discharge.
- [Appointments](https://the-medops.github.io/user-guide/features/appointments/)
  Book conflict-checked appointments in MedOps HMS against doctors' real availability, manage statuses, reschedule and cancel, and connect to consultations.
- [Activity Log](https://the-medops.github.io/user-guide/features/audit-logs/)
  A complete, searchable record in MedOps HMS of who did what and when across your organisation.
- [Billing & Payments](https://the-medops.github.io/user-guide/features/bills/)
  How bills are generated in MedOps HMS, recording payments, tracking unpaid bills, and cancelling mistakes.
- [Consultations](https://the-medops.github.io/user-guide/features/consultations/)
  Record a patient consultation in MedOps HMS — clinical notes and follow-up — and have the prescription and consultation bill created automatically on completion.
- [Dashboard](https://the-medops.github.io/user-guide/features/dashboard/)
  The MedOps HMS home screen — a role-aware starting point with quick access to your daily work, key numbers, and global search.
- [Managing Doctors](https://the-medops.github.io/user-guide/features/doctors/)
  Add doctors to MedOps HMS, manage their profiles and credentials, set their consultation fee, and invite them by email.
- [Hospitals & Departments](https://the-medops.github.io/user-guide/features/hospitals-and-departments/)
  Set up hospitals, departments, and the physical layout of floors, rooms and beds (with room pricing) that inpatient care relies on.
- [Medicines Catalogue](https://the-medops.github.io/user-guide/features/medicines/)
  The shared, searchable medicines catalogue in MedOps HMS used across prescriptions and pharmacy stock.
- [My Appointments & Availability](https://the-medops.github.io/user-guide/features/my-appointments/)
  For doctors — view your own appointment queue and set your weekly working hours, appointment slot length, leave and time-off in MedOps HMS.
- [Operations Team](https://the-medops.github.io/user-guide/features/operations-team/)
  Add and manage front-desk (Operations) staff in MedOps HMS, assign them to a hospital, and invite them by email.
- [Patients](https://the-medops.github.io/user-guide/features/patients/)
  Register patients in MedOps HMS, give each a unique Medical Record Number, search and update records, and view a full visit and prescription history.
- [Pharmacies](https://the-medops.github.io/user-guide/features/pharmacies/)
  Set up pharmacies in MedOps HMS with their tax rates and manage who can sign in to each pharmacy's portal.
- [Pharmacy Portal](https://the-medops.github.io/user-guide/features/pharmacy-portal/)
  The pharmacy team's workspace in MedOps HMS — manage stock and prices, receive supplies, dispense against prescriptions, handle walk-in sales, and bill with tax.
- [Prescriptions](https://the-medops.github.io/user-guide/features/prescriptions/)
  Clear, printable prescriptions in MedOps HMS with medicines, dosage, frequency and duration — created from a consultation and ready for the pharmacy.
- [Your Account & Profile](https://the-medops.github.io/user-guide/getting-started/account-and-profile/)
  View and edit your MedOps HMS profile, change your password, and understand what you can and cannot change yourself.
- [Signing In & The Basics](https://the-medops.github.io/user-guide/getting-started/)
  How to sign in to MedOps HMS, set up your password for the first time, reset a forgotten password, and understand sessions and signing out.
- [MedOps HMS — User Guide](https://the-medops.github.io/user-guide/)
  The user guide for MedOps HMS, the hospital management platform that brings patients, appointments, consultations, prescriptions, inpatient care, pharmacy and billing into one place.
- [Overview](https://the-medops.github.io/user-guide/introduction/)
  What MedOps HMS is, who uses it, and how it is organised — one shared patient record across the front desk, doctors, wards, pharmacy and billing.
- [Key Features](https://the-medops.github.io/user-guide/introduction/key-features/)
  A tour of everything MedOps HMS does — patients, appointments, consultations, prescriptions, inpatient care, pharmacy, billing, administration, search and activity logs.
- [Roles at a Glance](https://the-medops.github.io/user-guide/introduction/roles-overview/)
  The six MedOps HMS roles — Tenant Admin, Doctor, Nurse, Staff, Operations and Pharmacy — and what each can do.
- [FAQ](https://the-medops.github.io/user-guide/reference/faq/)
  Answers to common questions about using MedOps HMS.
- [Glossary](https://the-medops.github.io/user-guide/reference/glossary/)
  Plain-English definitions of the terms you'll meet in MedOps HMS.
- [Doctor](https://the-medops.github.io/user-guide/roles/doctor/)
  The Doctor guide for MedOps HMS — manage your appointment queue and availability, record consultations and prescriptions, and round on admitted patients.
- [Nurse](https://the-medops.github.io/user-guide/roles/nurse/)
  The Nurse guide for MedOps HMS — support inpatient care, view patient and ward information, and keep beds ready.
- [Operations (Front Desk)](https://the-medops.github.io/user-guide/roles/operations/)
  The Operations guide for MedOps HMS — register patients, book appointments, admit and discharge inpatients, and take payments.
- [Pharmacy](https://the-medops.github.io/user-guide/roles/pharmacy/)
  The Pharmacy guide for MedOps HMS — manage stock, dispense against prescriptions, handle walk-in sales, and bill with tax.
- [Staff](https://the-medops.github.io/user-guide/roles/staff/)
  The Staff guide for MedOps HMS — general hospital staff access to shared patient, ward and catalogue information.
- [Tenant Admin](https://the-medops.github.io/user-guide/roles/tenant-admin/)
  The Tenant Admin guide for MedOps HMS — set up hospitals, departments, beds, staff and preferences, and oversee billing and activity across the organisation.
- [First-Time Setup](https://the-medops.github.io/user-guide/workflows/first-time-setup/)
  A step-by-step guide for the Tenant Admin to set up MedOps HMS for the first time — hospitals, wards, staff, pharmacy and preferences.
- [An Inpatient Admission](https://the-medops.github.io/user-guide/workflows/inpatient-admission/)
  The end-to-end inpatient flow in MedOps HMS — admitting a patient to a bed, ward rounds and medications, transfers, and discharge.
- [An Outpatient Visit](https://the-medops.github.io/user-guide/workflows/outpatient-visit/)
  The end-to-end outpatient flow in MedOps HMS — from registering a patient and booking an appointment to consultation, billing and dispensing.
- [Pharmacy Dispensing](https://the-medops.github.io/user-guide/workflows/pharmacy-dispensing/)
  The pharmacy flow in MedOps HMS — keeping stock current, dispensing against a prescription, handling walk-in sales, and billing with tax.
